channel.title: AURO Insights
channel.description: The AI-first lead nurturing and qualification multi-agent system for Dubai real estate.

item.title: Test Article for Pipeline Verification - July 20, 2026
item.description: This is a test article to verify the content publishing pipeline is working correctly.
item.content:encoded: This is a test paragraph to verify the content publishing system is working correctly. If you can see this article on the live site, then the pipeline is functioning as expected.
